case_title: GUADALUPE SANCHEZ et al VS. JESUS AVILA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SANCHEZ, GUADALUPE SICAIROS, DELIA AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-26-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANCHEZ, GUADALUPE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-24-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVILA, JESUS
